page = <Page url='http://localhost:3100/workbench'>
frontend_base_url = 'http://localhost:3100'

    @pytest.fixture
    def logged_in_page(page: Page, frontend_base_url: str) -> Page:
        username, password = get_admin_credentials()
        page.set_default_timeout(NAV_TIMEOUT_MS)
        page.goto(f"{frontend_base_url}/login", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
        page.get_by_placeholder("admin").fill(username)
        page.get_by_placeholder("123456").fill(password)
        page.get_by_role("button", name="登录").click()
        page.wait_for_url(
            lambda url: "/login" not in url, timeout=ADMIN_LOGIN_TIMEOUT_MS
        )
>       expect(page).not_to_have_url(lambda url: "/login" in url)

        items: Union[

        ],

        ignoreCase: Optional[bool] = None,
    ) -> Sequence[ExpectedTextValue]:
        out: List[ExpectedTextValue] = []
        assert isinstance(items, (list, tuple))
        for item in items:
            if isinstance(item, str):
                o = ExpectedTextValue(
                    string=item,
                    matchSubstring=match_substring,
                    normalizeWhiteSpace=normalize_white_space,
                    ignoreCase=ignoreCase,
                )
                if o["ignoreCase"] is None:
                    del o["ignoreCase"]
                out.append(o)
            elif isinstance(item, Pattern):
                out.append(
                    expected_regex(item, match_substring, normalize_white_space, ignoreCase)
                )
            else:
